title: The Fiscal Responsibility and Budget Management Act, 2003
full_text: The Fiscal Responsibility and Budget Management Act, 2003 राजवित्तीय उत्तरदायित्व और बजट प्रबंध अधिनियम, 2003 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 200339 Act Number: 39 Enactment Date: 2003-08-26 Act Year: 2003 Short Title: The Fiscal Responsibility and Budget Management Act, 2003 Hindi Title: राजवित्तीय उत्तरदायित्व और बजट प्रबंध अधिनियम, 2003 Long Title: An Act to provide for the responsibility of the Central Government to ensure inter-generational equity in fiscal management and long-term macro-economic stability by achieving sufficient revenue surplus and removing fiscal impediments in the effective conduct of monetary policy and prudential debt management consistent with fiscal sustainability through limits on the Central Government borrowings, debt and deficits, greater transparency in fiscal operations of the Central Government and conducting fiscal policy in a medium-term framework and for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Finance Department: Department of Economic Affairs Enforcement Date: 05-07-2004 Notification: 5th July, 2004, vide notification No. G.S.R. 395(E), dated 2nd July, 2004, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(i). Show Related Subordinates Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Fiscal policy statements to be laid before Parliament. Section 4. Fiscal management principles. Section 5. Borrowing from Reserve Bank. Section 6. Measures for fiscal transparency. Section 7. Measures to enforce compliance. Section 7A. Laying of review reports. Section 8. Power to make rules. Show Related Subordinates Section 9. Rules to be laid before each House of Parliament. Section 10. Protection of action taken in good faith. Section 11. Jurisdiction of civil courts barred. Section 12. Application of other laws not barred. Section 13. Power to remove difficulties.
